mapper.select: SELECT r.*, p.real_name, p.gender, p.birthdate, p.case_number, d.dept_name FROM register r JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id JOIN department d ON r.deptment_id = d.id WHERE r.employee_id = #{doctorId} AND r.visit_state = #{visitState} ORDER BY r.queue_no ASC, r.visit_date ASC

SELECT r.*, p.real_name, p.gender, p.birthdate, p.case_number, p.phone, p.home_address, mr.readme, mr.present, mr.diagnosis, mr.record_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_request WHERE register_id = r.id) as check_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection_request WHERE register_id = r.id) as inspection_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prescription WHERE register_id = r.id) as prescription_count FROM register r JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON r.id = mr.register_id WHERE r.id = #{registerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE register SET visit_state = 'REFUNDED' WHERE id = #{id}
